title: LightTech
description: LightTech is a Technology focused Modpack that is tuned for top performance on any Computer that is less than 7 years on!
body:
# LightTech

Welcome to the **LightTech Modpack**, a cutting-edge Minecraft experience tailored for maximum performance on computers less than 7 years old. Dive into a world where technology knows no bounds, and embark on a journey of innovation, automation, and limitless possibilities.

## 🚀 Mod Pack Overview

The LightTech Mod Pack is meticulously curated to offer an optimal gaming experience without compromising much on quality or performance. Whether you're exploring vast landscapes, constructing complex structures, or delving into the depths of automation, this Modpack is designed to provide a seamless and immersive adventure for all players.

## 💡 Key Features

- **Optimized Performance:** Experience buttery-smooth gameplay, even on computers with moderate specifications. We've fine-tuned every aspect of the mod pack to ensure minimal resource consumption and maximal efficiency.

- **Tech-Centric Mods:** Dive into a plethora of tech-focused mods that introduce advanced machinery, automation, and energy systems. Build intricate factories, automate resource collection, and create awe-inspiring contraptions.

- **Beautiful Visuals:** While performance is our priority, we've also ensured that the mod pack retains its visual charm. High-quality textures and shaders enhance your gaming experience without taxing your system.

- **Balanced Gameplay:** We've carefully balanced the progression of mods to provide a sense of achievement and challenge. From early-game tinkering to late-game mastery, there's always something new to explore.

- **Community Feedback:** We actively listen to our community's feedback and regularly update the mod pack to ensure that it remains stable, bug-free, and up-to-date with the latest mod releases.

## 🛠️ Included Mods


- **Applied Energistics 2** 

- **Mekansism** 

- **Botany pots ores** 

## 🌐 How to Get Started

Getting started is easy:

1. **Install:** Download and install the LightTech Modpack.

2. **Launch:** Launch the Modpack and adjust the settings to your needs.

3. **Explore:** Dive into the world of advanced technology, automation, and innovation. Follow the in-game guide to kickstart your journey.

## 🎮 System Requirements

To ensure top-notch performance, your computer should meet the following requirements:

- **Processor:** Intel Core i5 or equivalent
- **Memory:** 2GB RAM
- **Graphics:** NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 or AMD Radeon RX 560
- **Storage:** 2GB available space
